name: chain_the_chillest_business_you_can_run_right_
method:
The chillest business you can run right now is building AI UGC FB / IG pages 

you can just become an affiliate for a brand and get paid $500 - 2k retainers per page you run + affiliate commissions

stages.task: Generate 30 AI UGC scripts/visuals per niche using claude -p with UGC hook templates
Cross-reference content topics against LEDGER/CREATOR_PROGRAMS.csv, inject highest-commission affiliate links
Post via FB/IG Graph API at optimal engagement windows (8AM, 12PM, 7PM local)
When page hits 1K+ engagements/week, trigger cold_email_template to brand's marketing team offering managed page retainer
